faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Insights for your community journey
faq.a1: Community Compass is a modern, interactive directory designed to help residents find local resources like food assistance, healthcare, and housing. We use AI and real-time mapping to ensure you get the help you need, when you need it.
faq.q2: How can I submit a new resource?
faq.a2: Simply click the 'Submit Resource' button in the navigation or on the Home page. Fill out the details about the organization or service, and once verified by our team, it will appear for everyone in the community.
faq.a3: Yes. We take privacy seriously. Most features can be used without an account. If you choose to sign up or submit a resource, we only use your information for verification and service communication.
faq.a4: The 'Verified' badge indicates that our team or a community moderator has confirmed the resource's details, ensuring the contact information, location, and services offered are accurate and up-to-date.

about.title: About Community Compass
about.subtitle: Empowering communities through accessible, comprehensive resource discovery

hero.title: Compassion in Action
hero.subtitle: Building a stronger, more connected neighborhood through shared resources and collective support.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Data-driven approach to solving local challenges

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.content: Finding real help shouldn't be a maze. Many services exist, but they are often scattered across outdated websites or physical bulletin boards.

solution.title: The Compass Solution
solution.content: We bridge the gap using modern tech. Real-time mapping, AI-powered search, and community-verified data ensure you always find the right path.

founder.title: ALEX RIVERA
founder.subtitle: Inspired by Tradition, Driven by Need
founder.quote1: Community Compass began with a simple observation: many of our neighbors were struggling to find help even when resources were right around the corner.
founder.quote2: I grew up believing that a community is only as strong as its most vulnerable member. After seeing the power of teamwork during local projects, I knew we needed a digital 'compass' to point people toward support.

footer.title: Build the Future Together
footer.subtitle: Join the movement and help us bridge the gap between need and support. Every resource shared is a hand extended to someone in need.

about.visionText: Community Compass aims to help people when things get tough. Help shows up in many forms, often through groups working tirelessly nearby. This space exists because getting assistance should not be as hard as it is. Sometimes a bit of clarity makes all the difference.
about.missionText: A place takes shape when people find what they need without getting lost. This website builds a single hub that brings together all resources into one place for people in need. One goal drives it: making access straightforward for everyone.
about.sustainabilitySummary: Green practices for a healthier tomorrow.
about.sustainabilityText: We prioritize the health of the planet and our community through eco-friendly practices and local partnerships.
about.communityText: Building strong relationships with neighbors and organizations to uplift every member of our society.
about.innovationText: Exploring tech solutions to create more accessible pathways for finding and sharing vital resources.
about.joinUsText: Help us expand our directory by submitting resources, sharing feedback, or getting involved in your community.
about.footerText: Connecting communities with the resources they need. Your guide to local support services.

morpher.desc1: Find verified local resources tailored to your exact needs.
morpher.desc2: Bridge the gap between residents and specialized support services.
morpher.desc3: Building a neighborhood where everyone has what they need to thrive.

footer.tagline: Connecting communities with the resources they need. Your guide to local support services.
footer.visionText: Community Compass aims to help people when things get tough. Help shows up in many forms. This space exists because getting assistance should not be as hard as it is. Communities grow stronger by knowing where to look.

helper.title: Community Helper
helper.subtitle: Ask me anything!
helper.greeting: Hi! I'm your Community Compass helper. How can I assist you today? You can ask me about finding resources, using the map, or getting help with any feature!
helper.searchQuestion: How do I search for resources effectively?
helper.categoriesQuestion: What types of resources can I find?
helper.searchResponse:
You can search for resources in several ways:

• **Keyword Search**: Use the search bar to find specific resources by name, description, or tags
• **Category Filters**: Select multiple categories to filter results (you can choose more than one!)
• **Location Filter**: Toggle between local resources (within ~200 miles) or all resources
• **Favorites**: Save frequently used resources for quick access

Pro tip: Try combining search terms with category filters for the best results!
helper.categoriesResponse:
Community Compass includes these resource categories:

• **Food Assistance** - Food banks, meal programs, nutrition help
• **Healthcare** - Clinics, medical services, health programs
• **Housing** - Shelter, rental assistance, housing support
• **Employment** - Job training, career services, employment help
• **Education** - Tutoring, GED programs, educational resources
• **Senior Services** - Programs for older adults
• **Mental Health** - Counseling, therapy, mental health support
• **Legal Aid** - Legal assistance, court help
• **Transportation** - Ride services, transit help
• **Child Care** - Daycare, after-school programs
• **Veterans Services** - Programs for veterans
• **Financial Assistance** - Money help, financial aid

Select multiple categories in the filter to see all relevant resources!
helper.mapResponse:
The interactive map helps you visualize resource locations:

• **Map View**: See all resources plotted on an interactive map
• **Density View**: Toggle heatmap to see resource concentration
• **Local Filter**: Focus on resources within ~200 miles
• **Click Resources**: Select any map pin to see detailed information
• **Zoom & Pan**: Navigate the map to explore different areas

The map is especially helpful for planning visits to multiple resources!
helper.favoritesResponse:
Favorites help you keep track of useful resources:

• **Save Resources**: Click the heart icon on any resource to save it
• **Quick Access**: Your favorites appear in a special filtered view
• **Sync Across Devices**: Favorites are tied to your account
• **Remove Favorites**: Click the heart again to remove from favorites

Perfect for resources you use regularly or want to remember!
helper.submitResponse:
Know a resource that should be listed? Submit it!

• **Add Resource**: Use the "Add Resource" page to submit new listings
• **Review Process**: All submissions are reviewed before being published
• **Required Info**: Include contact details, services offered, and location
• **Help Community**: Your submissions help others find needed resources

We appreciate community contributions to keep our database comprehensive!
helper.defaultResponse:
I can help you with:

• 🔍 Finding and searching resources
• 📍 Using the interactive map
• ❤️ Managing favorites
• 📝 Submitting new resources
• 🎯 Understanding different categories
• 🚀 Taking a guided tour

Try asking me about any of these topics, or click one of the quick action buttons above!

welcome.title: Welcome to Community Compass
welcome.content: Let us show you around to help you find the resources you need. This quick tour will take just a minute.

discover.title: Smart Search
discover.content: Use our high-contrast search bar to find exactly what you need. Type a keyword and the list will update instantly!

zipSearch.title: Local Precision
zipSearch.content: Enter your ZIP code to find resources exactly in your neighborhood. We'll prioritize the closest support for you.

filter.title: Powerful Filters
filter.content: Need something specific? Filter by category or toggle local results to narrow down your search.

map.title: Interactive Map
map.content: Visualize everything! Use the map to see exactly where resources are located relative to you.

resources.title: Verified Listings
resources.content: Every resource is community-verified. Click on any card to see detailed contact info, hours, and more.

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.content: Stay updated with the latest resources added by your neighbors in our live activity feed.

helper.title: Smart Assistant
helper.content: Have a question? Our AI-powered helper is always ready to guide you or answer specific questions.

impact.title: Our Collective Impact
impact.content: See how we're making a difference together. Explore our methodology and community stories on the About page.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.content: You've mastered the basics of Community Compass. Go ahead and start exploring your neighborhood!
